full_description: Place {A} into {B}; the blocks start on the upper layer and the plate is on the lower layer.
schema: {a} denotes the arm that moves a block
preference: num of words should not exceed 16. Emphasize there are two blocks, they start on the upper layer, and the plate is on the lower layer.
seen: Place {A} into {B}; the blocks start on the upper layer.
Pick {A} from the upper layer and put them into {B}.
Move {A} into {B} from the upper layer.
Carry {A} from the upper layer into {B}.
Take {A} and place them into {B} on the lower layer.
Use {a} to move {A} into {B} from above.
Transfer {A} into {B} from the upper layer.
unseen: Put {A} into {B} from the upper layer.
Pick {A} from above and place them into {B}.
Place {A} from the upper layer into {B}.

seen: find one upper block and grasp it
find the lower plate and place the block into it
unseen: place the block into the lower plate
